hero.subheadline: Reliable, affordable, and professional auto repair services to keep you safely on the road.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: From brake repairs to engine diagnostics, our certified technicians use state-of-the-art equipment to ensure your vehicle performs at its best.
featureSections.cardBody: We provide upfront pricing and clear explanations so you know exactly what your car needs.

featureSections.title: Why Dallas Drivers Choose Us

featureSections.cardBody: We offer shuttle service and loaner vehicles to minimize disruption to your day.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team is ASE-certified and undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: State-of-the-Art Diagnostics
whyChooseUs.description: We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately, saving you time and money.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty on parts and labor.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?

servicesPage.intro: At Colombia Auto Repair in Dallas, TX, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running safely and efficiently.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. Our technicians inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and more using high-quality parts. We ensure your brakes respond reliably in all conditions.
benefits: Peace of mind on every drive

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your brake system, including pads, rotors, lines, and fluid.

process.title: Repair & Replacement
process.description: Using premium parts, we replace worn components and ensure proper alignment and function.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We test your brakes on the road to confirm optimal performance and safety.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles depending on driving habits and vehicle type.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squeaking, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal indicate it's time for an inspection.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and reliable engine repairs.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your vehicle runs rough, trust our advanced diagnostic equipment to pinpoint the issue. We repair everything from minor sensor replacements to major engine overhauls, using OEM-quality parts.

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic scanner to read error codes and live data.

process.title: In-Depth Analysis
process.description: Our technicians interpret the data and perform additional tests to confirm the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We complete the necessary repairs and re-scan to ensure the issue is resolved.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose a check engine light without an appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer walk-in diagnostic services. Give us a call or stop by.

faqs.question: What does an engine diagnostic cost?
faqs.answer: Our diagnostic fee is $89, which is applied to any repairs you authorize.

services.title: Oil Changes & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes and fluid checks are vital for engine health. We use high-quality oils and filters to protect your engine, and we inspect all major fluids including coolant, transmission, brake, and power steering fluid.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil and replace it with the correct grade and amount for your vehicle.

process.title: Filter Change
process.description: We install a new oil filter to ensure clean oil circulation.

process.title: Fluid Check & Top-Off
process.description: We check all other fluids and top them off as needed.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional and synthetic oil options to match your vehicle's needs.

services.title: Tire Rotation & Alignment
services.shortDescription: Extend tire life and improve handling.
services.longDescription: Proper tire maintenance ensures even wear, better fuel economy, and safer handling. We rotate your tires according to manufacturer recommendations and perform precision alignments to keep your vehicle tracking straight.
benefits: Even tire wear and longer tread life

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect tires for wear patterns, pressure, and damage.

process.title: Rotation
process.description: We rotate tires to the recommended positions to promote even wear.

process.title: Alignment
process.description: Using laser alignment equipment, we adjust angles to factory specifications.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, or at each oil change.

faqs.question: Will alignment fix a pulling steering wheel?
faqs.answer: Yes, misalignment often causes pulling. We'll adjust it so your car drives straight.

about.headline: Your Trusted Local Auto Mechanic in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe and mobile.
story: Colombia Auto Repair has been serving the Dallas community for over 15 years. Founded by a team of passionate mechanics, our shop was built on the principles of integrity, transparency, and technical excellence. We started as a small garage and grew through word-of-mouth because our customers trust us to treat them fairly.

Today, we continue to invest in the latest tools and training to service all makes and models. Whether it's a routine oil change or a complex engine repair, we approach every job with the same dedication. Our loyal customers return because they know we stand behind our work and genuinely care about their safety.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs and always explain your options clearly.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We complete work on time and on budget, so you can get back on the road.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a locally owned business that supports Dallas neighborhoods.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Colombia Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Call us or stop by to schedule your service. We're here to help.
